genre_refs: John Trumbull painting 'The Declaration of Independence'
description: A slogan graphic that places a large white serif headline over John Trumbull's painting 'The Declaration of Independence' (the drafting committee presenting the document to the Continental Congress in a paneled hall, with the captured British flags on the back wall and delegates in 18th-century dress). A dark gradient is added along the bottom of the painting so the all-caps white text 'AMERICANISM WILL PREVAIL' reads clearly. A small white Department of Labor eagle/seal is centered just above the slogan. The tweet text reads 'The future belongs to the Patriot, not the globalist. AMERICA FIRST. AMERICANS FIRST.'
